title: UK crypto advocates launch campaign against banks blocking exchange transfers
summary: Stand With Crypto UK says banks are restricting access to regulated exchanges even as policymakers seek to position the country as a hub for digital asset innovation.

title: Pending Bank of Japan rate decision may impact Bitcoin price: Should traders prepare?
summary: Bitcoin’s average price response to Bank of Japan rate hikes was a 22.5% sell-off. Will BOJ’s upcoming policy decision trigger another BTC price crash?

title: Why Nike Keeps Stumbling
summary:
The return of Elliott Hill to lead Nike was supposed to reinvigorate the brand. Instead, setbacks in running, product development and brand strategy have kept the swoosh from once again hitting its stride.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Tells Investors It Has Lined Up Blue-Chip Credit Ratings
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is telling investors it has lined up investment-grade ratings from three major bond graders, according to people with knowledge of the matter, which could help the company cut funding costs as it continues to raise financing after its initial public offering.

title: Tether, Nvidia and Amazon Back Humanoid Robotics Firm NEURA in $1.4 Billion Funding Round
summary: Stablecoin giant Tether led a massive Series C round for German robotics firm NEURA, which will embed crypto payment tools and edge AI.

title: The Internet Is Furious at Anthropic After Claude Fable 5 Release
summary: Token burn, silent censorship, and a mandatory data grab—the biggest Claude release has become Anthropic's messiest.

title: Bitcoin takes back seat to stablecoins and tokenization among financial advisors: Bitwise CIO
summary: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan said financial advisors are now showing more interest in stablecoins and tokenization than bitcoin.

title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX IPO could become bitcoin’s latest headwind
summary: SpaceX setting aside up to 30% of IPO shares for retail investors could prompt investors to exit crypto assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum.

title: Trump warns US will soon hit Iran ‘hard’ again
summary: President’s remarks come after countries exchange fire following downing of American helicopter

title: Iran says 20,000 people left without water after US hits reservoir tanks
summary: Washington says its jets targeted air defence and radar sites after Iranian forces downed American helicopter
